system.description:
What it does (SRD): In starlight, moonlight, torchlight, and similar dim lighting, the creature can see twice as far as a human can in the same light. It retains the ability to distinguish color and detail under those conditions that a human could not.

ThirdEra: Low-light vision is set on this item’s Details tab under Capability grants (vision and senses), not in Mechanical effects (no extra distance is needed for the usual reading of the rule). The character sheet includes it with other vision from items and race.
